user.title: Shanghai Gas
user.description: Enter your Shanghai Gas account credentials. The integration fetches image captchas and recognizes them locally with ddddocr.

reauth_confirm.title: Log in to Shanghai Gas again
reauth_confirm.description: The current login has expired. Enter your Shanghai Gas account credentials to log in again.
